policy.materialization_boundary: Candidate copy opens only when every blocker axis has enough legal candidates and reviewable cuts.
policy.payoff_boundary: Large commander payoff shortfalls require a broader commander source lane, not a narrow interaction-style swap.
policy.repair_boundary: Candidates are review-only source-lane rows, not deck changes.
